Package org.eventb.internal.core.pog

Class POGNature

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.pog.POGNature
All Implemented Interfaces:
IPOGNature
class POGNature extends Object implements IPOGNature
Implementation of IPOGNature.

Instances of this class are intended to be created through POGNatureFactory only.
